440 TRNSPRTN_NO_RSPNS_DSCHRG_CD TRNSPRTN_NO_RSPNS_DSCHRG_CD Transportation: Patient unable to respond (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents that at the time of discharge the patient was unable to respond to the question regarding lack of transportation. 0 = No
